subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #035 Free Will and Foreknowledge
subcodes.first_line: The knowledge of a thing is not the cause of its occurrence; for the essential knowledge of God encompasses the realities
subcodes.first_line_orig: علم بشیء سبب حصول شیء نیست زیرا علم ذاتی حق محیط بر حقائق اشیاء قبل وجود اشیاء
subcodes.subjects: @God's knowledge, @special knowledge of the Manifestation of God, @free will and predestination; fate, @predictions and prophecies
